title: Protocol for Systematic Review: Food Safety Assessment of Smoked-Dried Achatina achatina Snail Meat in Ghanaian Markets
author: Asante-Donyinah, David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document presents the  Systematic Review Protocol for the Food Safety Assessment of Smoked-Dried Achatina achatina Snail Meat in Ghanaian Markets . It outlines the background, objectives, eligibility criteria, search strategy, data extraction methods, quality assurance, and ethical considerations guiding the forthcoming review. The protocol was peer-reviewed internally at the University of Ghana, School of Nuclear and Allied Sciences, Department of Nuclear Agriculture and Radiation Processing, and supervised by Prof. F. C. K. Ocloo. The inclusion of PRISMA-P and PRISMA 2020 appendices ensures methodological transparency and reproducibility. This version (PROTOCOL 2.1) serves as the registered framework for the systematic review and is deposited on Zenodo to support open-science practices and prevent selective reporting.
